creator: chris@shagged.org
text:
The tarfile for mdcrack has been repackaged so it extracts into its
	own directory as opposed to the cwd.

	Some small bugfixes, see diff

Diff of the source tar.gz's :

diff -u -r mdcrack/Makefile mdcrack-new/Makefile
--- mdcrack/Makefile    Thu Jun  7 09:17:26 2001
+++ mdcrack-new/Makefile        Mon Jul 16 22:53:02 2001
@@ -79,7 +79,7 @@
        @echo
        @echo
        @echo "to install -- \"make install\""
-       @echo "to test -- \"make test/bigtest\""
+       @echo "to test -- \"make test/fulltest\""
        @echo
 
 
@@ -275,8 +275,8 @@
 clean:
        @echo
        @echo  "Cleaning binaries..."
-       rm -f src/*.o src/*~ src/*#  
-       rm -f bin/*~ bin/mdcrack bin/*#
+       rm -f src/*.o src/*~ src/*# src/.#*  
+       rm -f bin/*~ bin/mdcrack bin/*# bin/.#*
        @echo
        @echo  "ok."
        @echo
diff -u -r mdcrack/Ncurses mdcrack-new/Ncurses
--- mdcrack/Ncurses     Thu Jun  7 09:23:50 2001
+++ mdcrack-new/Ncurses Mon Jul 16 22:49:58 2001
@@ -1,12 +1,12 @@
 
-Ncurses is not in some systems by default, if u don't have it or don't wish it, just desactivate it in the Makefile.
+Ncurses is not present in some systems by default, if u don't have it or just don't wish it,  desactivate it in the Makefile.
 Comment the two lines concerning Ncurses
 
 #NCURSES=-DNCURSES 
 
 #LDFLAGS=-lncurses
 
-If u are about to use Ncurses with a poorly featured terminal/non color terminal, u may better do by recompiling in a standard mode (without ncurses) otherwise resulting screen may be somewhat weird.
+If u are about to use Ncurses with a poorly featured terminal/non color terminal, u may do better by recompiling without ncurses otherwise the resulting screen might be somewhat weird.
 The real gain with the library merely reside in the presentation layer (color/animation/screen layout).
 However it's as u want, i prefer with. 
 
Only in mdcrack/src: .#core3.c
Only in mdcrack/src: md5c.o
diff -u -r mdcrack/src/mdcrack.c mdcrack-new/src/mdcrack.c
--- mdcrack/src/mdcrack.c       Mon May 28 01:52:02 2001
+++ mdcrack-new/src/mdcrack.c   Mon Jul 16 22:43:56 2001
@@ -28,7 +28,7 @@
    Version 0.8.5 Date: 03 Apr 2001.
    Version 0.9   Date: 06 Apr 2001.
    Version 0.9.5 Date: 08 May 2001.
-   Version 1.0   Date: 25 May 2001.
+   Version 1.0   Date: 16 Jul 2001.
 */
 
 
@@ -548,7 +548,7 @@
   int i;
   int found;
   FILE *des1;
-  char c;
+  int c;
   char resume[512];
   char value[128];
   char feed[500];

Fix: 

Diff of the ports distinfo:
diff mdcrack/distinfo mdcrack.new/distinfo
1c1
< MD5 (mdcrack-1.0.tar.gz) = 85a6174c98bfd70004a9d238b48e5e5d
---
> MD5 (mdcrack-1.0.tar.gz) = 9f9a51ca11f9b56f5b6d5aba20c0ed8d
